objective: Implement the 'Zen Study' UI: A minimalist, center-focused dialogue interface with vertical dictionary breakdowns and progressive translation reveal.
notes: 採用平行開發模式：建立全新組件 (Zen*) 而非直接修改舊版。
核心變更：置中佈局、迷你頭像、翻譯開關移至右上角、字典垂直原子拆解。

tasks.title: Create ZenEventDialogueBox component
tasks.goal: Build a new center-focused dialogue UI without the bottom black box.

tasks.title: Upgrade Top Bar with controls
tasks.goal: Move translation toggle and grammar note trigger to the top right.

tasks.title: Implement Progressive Reveal for translations
tasks.goal: Hide translations by default, only show when toggled via Top Bar.

tasks.title: Update Dictionary to Vertical Breakdown
tasks.goal: Change horizontal component list to a vertical deep-dive list for phrases.
